mapper.select: select document_id, project_id, document_category_id, version_id, milestone_id, created_by, title, description, setting_code_id status_code, status_name from document

select d.document_id, d.project_id, d.document_category_id, d.version_id, v.version_name, d.milestone_id, m.title as milestone_title, d.created_by, u.user_name, d.title, d.description, d.setting_code_id, d.status_code, d.status_name from document d LEFT JOIN milestone m ON d.milestone_id = m.milestone_id LEFT JOIN project_version v ON d.version_id = v.version_id LEFT JOIN users u ON d.created_by = u.user_id WHERE document_category_id IS NULL

select d.document_id, d.project_id, d.document_category_id, c.category_name, d.version_id, v.version_name, d.milestone_id, m.title as milestone_title, d.created_by, u.user_name, d.title, d.description, d.setting_code_id, d.status_code, d.status_name from document d LEFT JOIN milestone m ON d.milestone_id = m.milestone_id LEFT JOIN project_version v ON d.version_id = v.version_id LEFT JOIN users u ON d.created_by = u.user_id LEFT JOIN document_category c ON d.document_category_id = c.document_category_id WHERE d.document_category_id = #{documentCategoryId}

select d.document_id, d.project_id, d.document_category_id, c.category_name, d.version_id, v.version_name, d.milestone_id, m.title as milestone_title, d.created_by, u.user_name, d.title, d.description, d.setting_code_id, d.status_code, d.status_name from document d LEFT JOIN milestone m ON d.milestone_id = m.milestone_id LEFT JOIN project_version v ON d.version_id = v.version_id LEFT JOIN users u ON d.created_by = u.user_id LEFT JOIN document_category c ON d.document_category_id = c.document_category_id WHERE d.document_id = #{documentId}
select count(*) over() as total_cnt, document_category_id, project_id, category_name from document_category
